mapper.sql:
AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.PTN_NAME , AA.NATION , AA.PTN_LIC
, AA.PAGE_URL , AA.LOGO_FILE_ID , AA.DEL_YN , AA.RGTR AS RGTR_SEQ , AA.RGT_DTTM AS RGT_DATE , AA.CHNR AS CHNR_SEQ , AA.CHNG_DTTM AS CHNG_DATE
, AA.NATION_NAME , AA.YT_URL , AA.PTN_INTRO , AA.RECRUIT_YN

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PTN_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.PTN_LIC), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

choose.otherwise: AND ( AA.PTN_NAME LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR AA.NATION_NAME LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') OR AA.PTN_INTRO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%') )
